releases.release_description: Document for journal entries and accounts, performance fix in bank statement reconciliation
Nomenclature additions, fixed asset upgrade, bugfixes
Loan rewriting, accounting documents updated, bugfix
New reconciliated lines filter on accounts, accounting lines in entities, fixed asset filter, new fixed assets importer, reporting review, bugfix
Intervention API addition and bug fixes
Fix many bugs, correct and improve account reconciliation, add informations on sales regularizations dropdown
Accounting exchanges, map overlays, intervention/issue plant killing and some bug fixes
Refactorize plugin/gem support and fixes bugs
Change the trades (Sale/Purchase) and payments (Incoming/Outgoing) system and ergonomy. Add supports for new OFX files structure. Improve Nomenclature and fix interventions bugs.
Adds memo on bank statement items, fixes OFX encoding bug and others
Restore intervention from zero, enhance bank statement reconciliation, and many bug fix
Reviews outgoing payment list, adds codes for exchanges, and bug fixes
Bank statement reconciliation rework, rgularization and quick affairs introduction, and affair rework.
Adds more editable fields on sales form, tax payability on sales, automates journal entry number, and bug fixes.
Adds account navigation and some bug fixes
Sums on selected purchases/sales
Optimizes unroll, adds API for Zero, adds fields on deposits, and bug fixes

- Permits to change global currency, 
- Adds intracommunity tax support
- Some bug fixes
Trial balance export, tax declaration enhancement, bug fixes
Specializes affairs to simplifies process, add auto-lettering on affairs and tax declarations
Add new version of animal management
Adds 'create and continue' logic in interventions, sales, purchases and parcels. some bug fixes
Adds validation on intervention destruction and many bug fixes
Simplifies settings, hides help and global search tool, adds CAP 2016 varieties, and many bug fixes
Purchase contracts, new procedures, Portuguese accounting plan and some bug fix
API updated for Zero with the intervention participations.
Many bugs fixes and unitary tests added
SEPA integration and many bugs fixes.
Export of inspection in ODS
Intervention selling/purchasing, product population, stock accounting and many bug fixes.

Adds OAuth2 client for ekylibre.com, almost real-time visualization for sensors, simplifies authentication URL, adds filters on entities, simplifies target distributions updates, adds intervention/products labelling,
Adds integration frame
Extends API
Adds some information on cultivable zones and fixes bug
Adds employee purchase type to manage distinctly supplier and employees. Fixes bugs on interventions and variants introduced in previous version.
Adds equipment components management and activity seasons mainly.
Introduces the new product and intervention model which permit to manage all productions and all products.
It includes the new intervention engine which permit to sets many targets, inputs, outputs, tools, and operators in a same intervention.
